title: $appltitle
text: $appltitle Return or set the window title bar text of a Uniface Windows application. $appltitle $appltitle = ApplicationTitle Return Values Title of the application window. Use Use only in Application Shell and Form components. Description The $appltitle function has effect only when the application is using a GUI driver. Changing $appltitle overrides the value defined in the GUI-specific settings. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
